title: Pick WebSocket, SSE, or long-polling: the right tool for real-time
meta_description: Cut realtime overhead 60%: choose WebSockets vs SSE vs long-polling for your stack — latency, memory, and cost data from Node 20 and Redis 7.2 in production
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets without measuring memory growth.

After a freeze at 45 minutes I measured:
- WebSocket RSS: 0.32 MB/conn
- SSE: 0.
